title: Governance Consolidation Phase
purpose: Transition from recovery state to stable governed state. Establish canonical authority, invariant testing, recovery procedures, and merge strategy.
architectural_constraints: Must establish single source of truth
Must define integration topology before feature work resumes

deliverables.description: Single source of truth for all runtime governance
Branch integration topology and merge gates

acceptance_criteria: canonical-state.json is the ONLY authority for runtime state
All governance invariants pass under adversarial conditions
All 5 recovery playbooks are executable without operator memory
Merge strategy defines explicit rebase/merge/promotion order
Feature work freeze remains until consolidation passes validation

traceability.description: Governance consolidation: canonical authority, invariant tests, recovery playbooks, merge strategy
